zh.lifeSummary: 當Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway於1121年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克時，他的父親Fergus of Galloway41歲，母親Elizabeth FitzRoy26歲。他與Gunhilda of Allerdale在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1174年享年53歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway于1121年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克时，他的父亲Fergus of Galloway41岁，母亲Elizabeth FitzRoy26岁。他与Gunhilda of Allerdale在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1174年享年53岁，埋葬在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯。

nameMeanings.name: Uchtred
meanings: An old name. The same as the personal name Utred or Uhtred, probably from Old German ot-rat, distinguished in counsel, or illustrious councillor.

en.lifeSummary: When Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway was born in 1121, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Fergus of Galloway, was 41 and his mother, Elizabeth FitzRoy, was 26. He married Gunhilda of Allerdale in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1174, at the age of 53, and was buried in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway est né en 1121, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Fergus of Galloway, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzRoy, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Gunhilda of Allerdale à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1174, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway 1121 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fergus of Galloway 41 und seine Mutter Elizabeth FitzRoy 26. Er hat in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Gunhilda of Allerdale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1174 im Alter von 53 Jahren und wurde in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway è nato il nel 1121 nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Fergus of Galloway, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth FitzRoy, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Gunhilda of Allerdale nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1174, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Gallowayが1121年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックで生まれた時，父Fergus of Gallowayは41歳，母Elizabeth FitzRoyは26歳であった。スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーでGunhilda of Allerdaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1174年に53歳で死去し，スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway(이)가 1121년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fergus of Galloway(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzRoy(은)는 26세였다. 그는 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 Gunhilda of Allerdale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1174년 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway nasceu em 1121, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Fergus of Galloway, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth FitzRoy, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Gunhilda of Allerdale em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1174, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway родился в 1121 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Fergus of Galloway было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzRoy, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Gunhilda of Allerdale в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1174 г. в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway nació en 1121, en Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Fergus of Galloway, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Elizabeth FitzRoy, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Gunhilda of Allerdale en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1174, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.
